sourcesContent:
// Dashboard.js - Merged Sections in Same Card import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview'); if (!dashboardData) { return (

📊 Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Analyze customer behavior and predict churn risk

🔍

No Analysis Data Available

Run a customer analysis to view insights and predictions

); } // Extract data from API response const apiData = dashboardData.individualResult || {}; // Enhanced data with dynamic values from API const analysisData = { churnRisk: Math.round((apiData.probability || 0.161) * 1000) / 10, retentionProbability: Math.round((1 - (apiData.probability || 0.161)) * 1000) / 10, riskLevel: apiData.risk_level || "low", confidence: 92, trend: "decreasing", lastMonthComparison: -2.3, executiveSummary: { riskProbability: Math.round((apiData.probability || 0.161) * 1000) / 10, category: apiData.risk_level === "high" ? "critical" : apiData.risk_level === "medium" ? "monitoring" : "stable", riskLevel: apiData.risk_level === "high" ? "high immediate risk" : apiData.risk_level === "medium" ? "moderate risk" : "low immediate risk", recommendation: apiData.risk_level === "high" ? "immediate intervention required" : apiData.risk_level === "medium" ? "proactive monitoring recommended" : "proceeding directly to the action plan below", primaryRiskFactor: apiData.top_driver || "general behavior" }, comparisonMetrics: { churnRisk: { current: `${Math.round((apiData.probability || 0.161) * 1000) / 10}%`, target: "<15%", comparison: apiData.probability > 0.15 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target", value: Math.round((apiData.probability || 0.161) * 1000) / 10 }, tenure: { current: `${apiData.customer_data?.Tenure || 5} mo`, target: ">12 mo", comparison: (apiData.customer_data?.Tenure || 5) > 12 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target", value: apiData.customer_data?.Tenure || 5 }, daysSinceOrder: { current: `${apiData.customer_data?.DaySinceLastOrder || 7} d`, target: "<7 d", comparison: (apiData.customer_data?.DaySinceLastOrder || 7) > 7 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target", value: apiData.customer_data?.DaySinceLastOrder || 7 }, satisfaction: { current: `${apiData.customer_data?.SatisfactionScore || 3}/5`, target: ">4/5", comparison: (apiData.customer_data?.SatisfactionScore || 3) > 4 ? "Above Target" : "Below Target", value: apiData.customer_data?.SatisfactionScore || 3 } }, businessImpact: apiData.business_impact ? { estimatedCV: `₹${Math.round(apiData.business_impact.estimated_clv || 16250).toLocaleString()}`, retentionBudget: `₹${Math.round(apiData.business_impact.retention_budget || 813).toLocaleString()}`, potentialLoss: `₹${Math.round(apiData.business_impact.potential_revenue_loss || 2624).toLocaleString()}`, roiPotential: `${Math.round((apiData.business_impact.roi_retention || 2.2) * 10) / 10}x` } : { estimatedCV: "₹16,250", retentionBudget: "₹813", potentialLoss: "₹2,624", roiPotential: "2.2x" } }; // Enhanced Churn Prediction Display Component with Gauge const ChurnPredictionDisplay = () => (

🎯 Churn Risk Prediction

🎯 {analysisData.confidence}% Confidence
{/* Main Risk Gauge */}
{analysisData.churnRisk}%
Churn Probability
Low (0-30%)
Medium (31-70%)
High (71-100%)
{/* Risk Details */}
{analysisData.riskLevel.toUpperCase()} RISK
{analysisData.trend === 'decreasing' ? '↘' : analysisData.trend === 'increasing' ? '↗' : '→'} {Math.abs(analysisData.lastMonthComparison)}%
Churn Risk {analysisData.churnRisk}%
Retention Probability {analysisData.retentionProbability}%
{/* Quick Insights */}

📈 Quick Insights

{analysisData.riskLevel === 'low' ? '✅' : analysisData.riskLevel === 'medium' ? '⚠️' : '🚨'}
{analysisData.riskLevel === 'low' ? 'Low Risk Category' : analysisData.riskLevel === 'medium' ? 'Medium Risk Category' : 'High Risk Category'} {analysisData.riskLevel === 'low' ? 'Customer shows minimal churn signals' : analysisData.riskLevel === 'medium' ? 'Customer requires proactive monitoring' : 'Immediate intervention recommended'}
🎯
Top Risk Driver {analysisData.executiveSummary.primaryRiskFactor}
📊
Retention Probability {analysisData.retentionProbability}% chance of retention
💰
Recommended Budget {analysisData.businessImpact.retentionBudget}
); // Risk Header Component const RiskHeader = () => (

Churn Risk Analysis Report

{analysisData.riskLevel.toUpperCase()} RISK ({analysisData.churnRisk}%) Primary risk factor identified as {analysisData.executiveSummary.primaryRiskFactor}.
); // Combined Executive Summary and Metrics Component const CombinedAnalysisSection = () => (
📋

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY & PERFORMANCE ANALYSIS

{/* Executive Summary Text */}

Executive Overview

This customer is currently evaluated at a {analysisData.executiveSummary.riskProbability}% churn probability and is categorized as {analysisData.executiveSummary.category} and poses a {analysisData.executiveSummary.riskLevel}. We recommend {analysisData.executiveSummary.recommendation}.

{/* Performance Metrics */}

📊 Performance Metrics

Current Churn Risk

{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.comparison === 'Above Target' ? '↑' : '↓'} {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.comparison}
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.current}
Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.target}

Customer Tenure

{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.comparison === 'Above Target' ? '↑' : '↓'} {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.comparison}
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.current}
Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.target}

Days Since Last Order

{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.comparison === 'Above Target' ? '↑' : '↓'} {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.comparison}
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.current}
Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.target}

Satisfaction Score

{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.comparison === 'Above Target' ? '↑' : '↓'} {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.comparison}
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.current}
Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.target}
{/* Business Impact Analysis */}

💼 Business Impact Analysis

💰
{analysisData.businessImpact.estimatedCV}
Estimated Customer Value
🛡️
{analysisData.businessImpact.retentionBudget}
Retention Budget
⚠️
{analysisData.businessImpact.potentialLoss}
Potential Loss
📈
{analysisData.businessImpact.roiPotential}
ROI Potential
); // Enhanced Recommendations Component const Recommendations = () => (
🎯

Recommended Actions

{apiData.recommendations && apiData.recommendations.map((rec, index) => (
{index + 1}
{rec.split(':')[0]}
{rec.split(':')[1]}
{index === 0 ? 'High Priority' : index === 1 ? 'Medium Priority' : 'Low Priority'}
))}
); // Enhanced Overview Tab const renderOverview = () => (
{/* Churn Risk Prediction with Gauge */} {/* Risk Header */} {/* Combined Analysis Section */} {/* Recommendations */} {apiData.recommendations && }
); return (

Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Advanced predictive analytics for customer retention

{activeTab === 'overview' && renderOverview()} {activeTab === 'detailed' && (

Detailed Feature Analysis

Coming soon - Detailed breakdown of all features and their impact on churn prediction.

)} {activeTab === 'action' && (

Retention Action Plan

Coming soon - Customized retention strategies based on risk level.

)}
); } export default Dashboard;
